tags.name: `mc-link-button`
tags.description:
Purpose: Component for displaying a link in a button style.
Category: Navigation
When to use: When you need a button that looks like a link.
When not to use: When you need a standard button.
Works with components: all components
Alternative component names: Link Button, Hyperlink Button, Anchor Button, Text Button, Inline Button

Events:

  * ``click`` {`MouseEvent`} - Emitted when the button is clicked.

  * ``focus`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button is focused.

  * ``blur`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button is blurred.

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot for the `button`. Used to display custom text/icon in the middle of the button.

  * ``icon`` {} - The icon HTML to use for the `button`.

  * ``trailingicon`` {} - The trailing icon HTML to use for the `button`.

attributes.name: on`click`
attributes.description: ``click`` {`MouseEvent`} - Emitted when the button is clicked.

attributes.name: on`focus`
attributes.description: ``focus`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button is focused.

attributes.name: on`blur`
attributes.description: ``blur`` {`FocusEvent`} - Emitted when the button is blurred.
